title: Jeffrey Porter
compiled_truth: Jeffrey Porter is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-05-09), Jeffrey Porter sent 38 and received 143 emails, totalling 181 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (28), [Joann Collins](people/joann-collins) (15), [Michael Garred](people/michael-garred) (12), [Ena Nominations](people/ena-nominations) (11), [Alvin Thompson](people/alvin-thompson) (7).
